description: CompositionWhite and blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a slim narrow collar, a full front buttoned placket, three quarter length sleeves with buttoned cuffs, yoke with stitched box pleat at back, buttoned flap pockets on chest and a curved hem with contrast reinforcing at sidesFitRegularWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its cowboy styling is kept feminine with three quarter length sleeves and a slim collar, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for a cowgirl look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8”
